summary: Completed testing of Products MongoDB migration, Notify Me feature, and Admin Product CRUD. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Coming Soon products show 'Notify Me When Available' button, regular products show 'Add to Cart', trust badges show 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients'.

GET /api/products returns 7 products fro.details: Returns 7 products with id, name, sizes, comingSoon, isActive fields. 2 products marked comingSoon=true (grated-omani-bakhoor, yemeni-bakhoor-chips)

POST /api/notify-me for coming-soon prod.details: Returns success message for coming-soon products, 400 error for regular products

POST /api/cart/{session}/add blocks comi.details: Returns 400 with 'This product is coming soon and cannot be added to cart yet'

GET /api/admin/notify-me returns aggrega.details: Returns grouped signups by product_id with count and emails

GET /api/admin/products returns all prod.details: Returns all 7 products including inactive ones (requires admin auth)

POST /api/admin/products creates new pro.details: Creates product with auto-generated slug from name

DELETE /api/admin/products/{id} deletes.details: Successfully deletes product and refreshes cache

Product detail page - Coming Soon produc.details: /products/grated-omani-bakhoor shows 'Notify Me When Available' button instead of 'Add to Cart'

Trust badges on product pages.details: Shows 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients' on product detail pages

Admin sidebar navigation.details: Products and Notify Me nav items defined in /app/frontend-next/app/admin/layout.js lines 33-34

critical_code_review_comments: Products correctly loaded from MongoDB with in-memory cache (refresh_products_cache in products.py)
Cart add endpoint correctly blocks coming-soon products (line 144-145 in products.py)
NotifyMeButton component correctly auto-fills email for logged-in users
Admin product CRUD correctly refreshes cache after operations
Trust badges updated to 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients'

test_credentials.note: Admin login requires 2FA - OTP sent to email, can be retrieved from MongoDB admin_2fa_tokens collection

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - products are seeded via /app/backend/scripts/seed_products.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Products MongoDB migration complete. 7 products in database with 2 marked comingSoon=true (grated-omani-bakhoor, yemeni-bakhoor-chips). Notify Me feature working - POST /api/notify-me accepts email+product_id for coming-soon products. Admin CRUD at /api/admin/products with full create/update/delete/toggle-active. Admin pages at /admin/products and /admin/notify-me. Trust badges show 'Ethical Sourcing / Premium Ingredients'. All backend tests in test_products_notify_me.py.
